creator: niclas.zeising@gmail.com
text:
libpurple and related pidgin and finch in our ports is out of date. Vendor has released a new version, 2.8.0. This version includes a shlib version bump.

Fix: Attached patch updates libpurple, pidgin and finch to the latest version. It also bumps portrevision of related ports to chase the shlib bump. Unfortunately pidgin-sipe does not currently build with this version of pidin, and as such is marked broken.
